final:
module JK_flip_flop(
    input Inv_J,
    input K,
    input Clock,
    input Reset,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge Clock or posedge Reset) begin
        if (Reset) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            case ({Inv_J, K})
                2'b00: Q <= Q;       // No change
                2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Reset
                2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Set
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
